messages.text: Basket 1: a light tan woven wicker basket shaped like a duck (rounded body with a small head/beak), with a handle arching over its back.
Basket 2: deep rounded bucket basket with a very dark brown thick arched handle; body is medium brown weave with a lighter tan band around the top rim.
Basket 3: rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle; has a hinged lid that’s open/flipped up to the right side.
Basket 4: oval/boat-shaped light tan basket with white/cream banded weave; single arched handle with small reddish wrap accents near the sides.
Basket 5: low rectangular medium-brown basket with a thick twisted-rope handle and a checker/box weave on the sides.
light tan cat-face lidded round basket (cat head)
Basket 7: boxy rectangular basket with green/teal striped sides and a thick braided brown rim/handle.

ai_messages.text: Basket 1: a light tan woven wicker basket shaped like a duck (rounded body with a small head/beak), with a handle arching over its back.
Basket 2: deep rounded bucket basket with a very dark brown thick arched handle; body is medium brown weave with a lighter tan band around the top rim.
Basket 3: rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle; has a hinged lid that’s open/flipped up to the right side.
Basket 4: oval/boat-shaped light tan basket with white/cream banded weave; single arched handle with small reddish wrap accents near the sides.
Basket 5: low rectangular medium-brown basket with a thick twisted-rope handle and a checker/box weave on the sides.

Basket 7: boxy rectangular basket with green/teal striped sides and a thick braided brown rim/handle.

distinctive_features: animal-shaped lidded basket that looks like a duck
rounded body with a small head/beak on the right
single handle arching over the back
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: Emphasize it’s a duck-shaped basket with a handle over its back (not the cat-face one).

ai_reasoning_log.utterance: Basket 1: a light tan woven wicker basket shaped like a duck (rounded body with a small head/beak), with a handle arching over its back.

reasoning.discriminative_question: Is it the duck with a handle over its back (not the round duck face one)?

distinctive_features: two-tone: lighter tan rim band with darker woven body
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: Emphasize the very dark thick handle and the deep bucket-like rounded body with a lighter rim band.

ai_reasoning_log.utterance: Basket 2: deep rounded bucket basket with a very dark brown thick arched handle; body is medium brown weave with a lighter tan band around the top rim.

distinctive_features: lighter tan band around top rim
reasoning.discriminative_question: Is the handle almost black and noticeably thicker than the rim?

distinctive_features: hinged lid flipped open to the right side
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: emphasize the rectangular shape plus the open hinged lid and the tall center handle

ai_reasoning_log.utterance: Basket 3: rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle; has a hinged lid that’s open/flipped up to the right side.

reasoning.discriminative_question: Is the lid a single flap opened to the right (not a flat lidded trunk)?

reasoning.discriminative_question: Is it the pale basket with red wraps at the handle bases?

distinctive_features: rectangular low basket with rounded corners
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: Emphasize the thick twisted handle and the low rectangular shape with checker weave.

reasoning.discriminative_question: Is it the small low rectangle with a single thick braided handle (not the taller greenish rectangle)?

distinctive_features: round lidded basket shaped like a cat head
cat face with whiskers and nose on lid
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: emphasize cat-face lidded round form (not duck)
